svg.title: Engineered Systems by Naboraj Sarkar
svg.desc: A showcase of highly scalable, open-source systems engineered by Naboraj Sarkar, including Life Logger, Auto Contribution Bot, and NS Fin.

g.text: A collection of highly scalable systems architected through deep reasoning, automation, and continuous learning.
A robust, research-focused dashboard for processing
Every system is architected with strict engineering principles, focusing on extreme performance,
